title: Warm up
content: Three images depict taxi drivers' views from inside vehicles in Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, each showing distinct cityscapes and cultural elements. The images set up a comparison of urban environments across different Chinese cities.
key_claims: Beijing scene shows modern skyscrapers alongside traditional architecture with heavy traffic
Chongqing scene shows a driver reading with mountainous terrain and cable cars visible
Hangzhou scene shows a driver using a smartphone with AI/robot technology graphics and a lake view

title: An Evolving Nation
content: This is a title slide introducing the presentation theme 'A Ride Through China' with the subtitle 'An Evolving Nation'. It features images of a taxi sign and iconic Chinese architecture including the Forbidden City, a riverside town, and a pagoda.
key_claims: Presentation subtitle is 'A Ride Through China'
Visual theme combines taxis with traditional Chinese landmarks

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain! Investigate and research
content: This slide outlines a three-step process flow for the session's activity: Local Features, Development Strategies, and Outcomes & Positive Impact. An isometric city illustration accompanies the flowchart to represent urban development.
key_claims: Process flow moves from Local Features to Development Strategies to Outcomes & Positive Impact
Session focuses on investigating and researching city development

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This is a matching exercise slide where students connect three Chinese cities (Beijing, Chongqing, Hangzhou) to their respective development strategies. Lines show the correct matches between cities and strategies, accompanied by photos of each city's landmarks.
key_claims: Beijing is matched with Sustainable urban development
Chongqing is matched with Tourism & Economic growth
Hangzhou is matched with Technology & tradition integration (融合)

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: This slide summarizes the three cities' distinct development strategies as seen through taxi driver perspectives, reinforcing the answers from the matching exercise. It concludes with the overarching theme that China is an evolving nation where each city tailors strategies to its local features.
key_claims: Each city develops strategies based on local features to promote city development (因地制宜)
